homepage.label: Matrix homeserver URL
homepage.description: Enter the address below into your Matrix-client as the homeserver.

messaging.button: Text & voice messages, calls and video meetings
messaging.title: Messaging and calls in Matrix

intro.title: Messaging in Element
intro.description: Element supports text messages, voice messages, voice calls and video meetings — all in one app. These work in any room or direct message conversation.

space.title: Your Space and rooms
space.description: When you join, you are automatically added to a Space with pre-created rooms: General, Helpdesk and Off-topic. These are your starting points for team communication.

rooms.title: Talking in rooms
rooms.description: Send messages in any room or start direct messages with other members. You can also create new rooms for specific topics to keep discussions organised.

calls.title: Voice and video calls
calls.description: Start a voice or video call directly from any room or direct message — useful for quick conversations without scheduling a meeting.

meetings.title: Video meetings
meetings.description: Element supports group video meetings. Start one from any room to bring your team together for a briefing or a collaborative session.

setup.title: Setting up your workspace
setup.description: Create rooms in your Space for the topics your unit needs — operations, planning, logistics, or anything else. Rooms can be restricted to Space members so only the right people have access.

daily.title: Day-to-day communication
daily.description: Use text messages for written communication and voice messages for quick audio notes when typing is inconvenient. Keeping discussions in topic-specific rooms helps everyone follow what matters to them.

calls.title: Calls and meetings
calls.description: Use voice calls for quick coordination. Start video meetings for team briefings or when remote collaboration needs a face-to-face feel.

users.title: Managing users
users.description: Admins can manage room membership and access. Users promoted to admin in Deploy App automatically receive elevated access in the Space and are added to the admin channel.

federation.title: Working with other Matrix servers
federation.description: By default, you can invite users from other Matrix homeservers to your rooms. This allows interoperability with allies or partner organisations that also run Matrix.

onboarding.completionDesc: You're all set and ready to operate at full capacity.
onboarding.progressSaved: Your onboarding progress has been saved.

desktop-intro.title: Welcome to Matrix
desktop-intro.description: This onboarding uses the Element-client, but you can use almost any Matrix Client. The steps you need to take should be somewhat similar in other clients.

setup.title: Prerequisites
setup.description: Copy the homeserver address (1). You can return to the guide always from the bottom right corner.(2)

desktop-step-3.title: Log into Element - 3
desktop-step-3.description: Paste the server address you copied earlier. Press "Continue".

desktop-step-4.title: Log into Element - 4
desktop-step-4.description: Press "Continue with Keycloak". Continue in your browser, which should ask your for your mTLS-certificate. Authenticate with mTLS.

desktop-step-5.title: Element Homepage
desktop-step-5.description: You are now logged in and able to use Matrix. You can see or create spaces on the left (1). You can see and create your direct messages near the middle (2).

mobile-intro.title: Welcome to Matrix
mobile-intro.description: This onboarding uses the Element Classic-client, but you can use almost any Matrix Client. The steps you need to take should be somewhat similar in other clients.

mobile-step-3.title: Log into Element Classic - 3
mobile-step-3.description: Paste the server address you copied earlier. Press "Next".

mobile-step-4.title: Log into Element Classic - 4
mobile-step-4.description: Press "Continue with Keycloak". Continue in your browser, which should ask your for your mTLS-certificate. Authenticate with mTLS.

mobile-step-5.title: Element Classic Homepage
mobile-step-5.description: You are now logged in and able to use Matrix. You search users and rooms at the top right corner (1). You can start a chat from the bottom right corner (2).

onboarding.title: Onboard to Matrix
